member.name: T:Pem
member.summary:
Internal utility class for handling PEM objects.
Privacy-Enhanced Mail (PEM) is a de facto file format for storing and sending cryptographic keys, certificates, and other data.

member.name: M:Pem.ReadPrivateKey(TextReader,System.String)
member.summary:
Reads a private key from a PEM source. Supports:
Unencrypted PKCS#8 private keys
Encrypted PKCS#8 private keys
Traditional OpenSSL key pairs
member.exception: If the key is invalid or unsupported

member.name: T:Pem.PasswordFinder
member.summary: Password finder used by PemReader for encrypted PEMs.
